title: dubautia scabra subsp. leiophylla
intro: Dubautia scabra subsp. leiophylla, also known as the 'Kauai scrub dubautia,' is a rare flowering plant species endemic to the Hawaiian island of Kauai. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and providing antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, although modern scientific studies are still limited, and more research is needed to confirm its full range of uses and effects.
